date_of_joining: January 2026 (leaves will be provided for examination)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months Internship : Rs 15,000 / per month Salary after 6 months Internship : CTC 5.00 LPA
package_salary.bond: 1. Every selected candidate must have to sign a Service Agreement of 1.5 Years which includes 6 months of internship + 1 year of employment. 2. Original Documents will be submitted at the time of joining (Undertaking letter will be issued to the candidates for the same)

selection_process_steps: 3. Technical Interview 1 (One-to-One Google Meet Video Call)
4. Technical Interview 2 (One-to-One Google Meet Video Call)
5. Final HR (One to One Google Meet Video Call)
